mapper.select:
select dataType, tableNameEn,tableId,tableNameCh,tableName,tableShowData,targetCode from ( select 'dataprocess' as dataType, s.table_name as tableNameEn , o.tableid as tableId, o.objectname as tableNameCh, s.tableName as tableName, case when o.objectname is null then '数据加工 —> '||s.tableName else '数据加工 —> '||o.objectname end as tableShowData, o.data_source as targetCode from (select objectname,tableid,data_source,tablename from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o right join (select distinct tableName, table_name from(select substr(input_tablename , instr(input_tablename , '.' )+1) as tableName, input_tablename as table_name from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE union all select substr(output_tablename , instr(output_tablename , '.' )+1) as tableName, output_tablename as table_name from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE ) where tableName is not null) s on upper(o.tablename) = upper(s.tableName))
upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%${queryStr}%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%${queryStr}%') or tableNameCh like '%${queryStr}%'
upper(tableNameEn) = upper('${queryStr}') or upper(tableId) = upper('${queryStr}') or tableNameCh = '${queryStr}'
order by tableName asc

select dataType,tableNameEn,tableId,tableNameCh, tableName,tableShowData,targetCode from ( select 'dataprocess' as dataType, s.table_name as tableNameEn , o.tableid as tableId, o.objectname as tableNameCh, s.tableName as tableName, case when o.objectname is null then '数据加工 —> '||s.tableName else '数据加工 —> '||o.objectname end as tableShowData, o.data_source as targetCode from (select objectname,tableid,data_source,tablename from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o right join (select distinct substr(table_name , instr(table_name , '.' )+1) as tableName,table_name from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE) s on upper(o.tablename) = upper(s.tableName))
upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%${queryStr}%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%${queryStr}%') or tableNameCh like '%${queryStr}%'

select t.* ,o1.objectname as childrenTableNameCh,o2.objectname as parentTableNameCh , o1.tableid as childrenTableId ,o2.tableid as parentTableId, nodeName,flowName from ( select a.table_name as childrenTN , substr(a.table_name , instr(a.table_name , '.' )+1) as childrenTableName, b.table_name as parentTN , substr(b.table_name , instr(b.table_name , '.' )+1) as parentTableName, a.node_name as nodeName, a.sub_flow_name as flowName from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE a , (select node_name,sub_flow_name,type,table_name from SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE
type=1
and upper(table_name) = upper('${queryTableName}')
and upper(substr(table_name , instr(table_name , '.' )+1)) = upper('${queryTableName}')
) b where a.node_name = b.node_name and a.sub_flow_name=b.sub_flow_name and a.type=2) t left join (select * from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o1 on upper(t.childrenTableName) = upper(o1.tablename) left join (select * from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o2 on upper(t.parentTableName) = upper(o2.tablename)

select t.* ,o1.objectname as childrenTableNameCh,o2.objectname as parentTableNameCh , o1.tableid as childrenTableId ,o2.tableid as parentTableId, nodeName,flowName from ( select a.table_name as parentTN , substr(a.table_name , instr(a.table_name , '.' )+1) as parentTableName, b.table_name as childrenTN , substr(b.table_name , instr(b.table_name , '.' )+1) as childrenTableName, a.node_name as nodeName, a.sub_flow_name as flowName from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE a , (select node_name,sub_flow_name,type,table_name from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE
type=2
and upper(table_name) = upper('${queryTableName}')
and upper(substr(table_name , instr(table_name , '.' )+1)) = upper('${queryTableName}')
) b where a.node_name = b.node_name and a.sub_flow_name=b.sub_flow_name and a.type=1) t left join (select objectname,tableid,tablename from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o1 on upper(t.childrenTableName) = upper(o1.tablename) left join (select objectname,tableid,tablename from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o2 on upper(t.parentTableName) = upper(o2.tablename) where upper(childrentn) != upper(parenttn)

select applicationName,subModuleName,dataBaseType, project,tableNameEn,tableNameCh from( select APPLICATION_NAME as applicationName, SUB_MODULE_NAME as subModuleName, DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType, PROJECT as project, TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEn, tablename_ch as tableNameCh, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by APPLICATION_NAME||SUB_MODULE_NAME||DATABASE_TYPE||PROJECT||TABLENAME_EN order by insert_date desc) as num from ApplicationSystem
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) like upper('%${tableName}%')
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) = upper('${tableName}')
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) like upper('%${tableName}%') or upper(APPLICATION_NAME) like upper('%${tableName}%') or upper(SUB_MODULE_NAME) like upper('%${tableName}%') or upper(tablename_ch) like upper('%${tableName}%')
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) = upper('${tableName}')
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) = upper('${tableName}')
upper(PROJECT||'.'||TABLENAME_EN) = upper('${tableName}') or upper(APPLICATION_NAME) = upper('${tableName}') or upper(SUB_MODULE_NAME) = upper('${tableName}') or upper(tablename_ch) = upper('${tableName}')
) where num = 1

select applicationName,subModuleName,dataBaseType,project,tableNameEn,tableNameCh from( select APPLICATION_NAME as applicationName, SUB_MODULE_NAME as subModuleName, DATABASE_TYPE as dataBaseType, PROJECT as project, TABLENAME_EN as tableNameEn, tablename_ch as tableNameCh, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by APPLICATION_NAME||SUB_MODULE_NAME||DATABASE_TYPE||PROJECT||TABLENAME_EN order by insert_date desc) as num
from ApplicationSystem )

select count(0) from ApplicationSystem
upper(APPLICATION_NAME) = upper(#{applicationName})
and upper(SUB_MODULE_NAME) = upper(#{subModuleName})
and upper(TABLENAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn})
mapper.delete:
delete from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_relation
upper(NODE_ID) =upper(#{nodeId}) and upper(TYPE)=upper(#{type})

delete from COLUMN_BLOODLINE_relation where upper(TYPE)=upper('datastandard') and
upper(NODE_ID) = upper(#{item})
mapper.select:
select DISTINCT tablename from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and rownum = 1 and upper(tableid) = upper(#{tableId})
and data_source = #{tableCode}

select t.parentTN,t.parentTableName,t.childrenTN,t.childrenTableName,t.nodeName,t.flowName , case when o1.objectname is not null then o1.objectname else o4.TABLECOMMENT end as childrenTableNameCh, case when o2.objectname is not null then o2.objectname else o3.TABLECOMMENT end as parentTableNameCh , o1.tableid as childrenTableId ,o2.tableid as parentTableId, nodeName,flowName,dataType from ( select input_tablename as parentTN , substr(input_tablename , instr(input_tablename , '.' )+1) as parentTableName, output_tablename as childrenTN , substr(output_tablename , instr(output_tablename , '.' )+1) as childrenTableName, node_name as nodeName, flow_name as flowName, NODE_TYPE as dataType from (select input_tablename,output_tablename,node_name,flow_name,NODE_TYPE , ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by node_id||input_tablename||output_tablename order by insert_date desc) as num from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE) where num = 1) t left join (select objectname,tablename,tableid from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o1 on upper(t.childrenTableName) = upper(o1.tablename) left join (select objectname,tablename,tableid from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') o2 on upper(t.parentTableName) = upper(o2.tablename) left join (select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT from ( select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by concat(TABLEPROJECT,tablename) order by PARTITIONDATE desc) as num from synlte.syndmg_table_all where TABLECOMMENT is not null) t where t.num=1 and t.PARTITIONDATE is not null ) o3 on upper(t.parentTN) = upper(o3.tableproject||'.'||o3.tablename) left join (select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT from ( select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by concat(TABLEPROJECT,tablename) order by PARTITIONDATE desc) as num from synlte.syndmg_table_all where TABLECOMMENT is not null) t where t.num=1 and t.PARTITIONDATE is not null ) o4 on upper(t.childrenTN) = upper(o4.tableproject||'.'||o4.tablename) where upper(childrentn) != upper(parenttn)

select t.parentTN,t.parentTableName,t.childrenTN,t.childrenTableName,t.nodeName,t.flowName , case when o1.objectname is not null then o1.objectname else o4.TABLECOMMENT end as childrenTableNameCh, case when o2.objectname is not null then o2.objectname else o3.TABLECOMMENT end as parentTableNameCh , o1.tableid as childrenTableId ,o2.tableid as parentTableId, nodeName,flowName from ( select a.table_name as parentTN , substr(a.table_name , instr(a.table_name , '.' )+1) as parentTableName, b.table_name as childrenTN , substr(b.table_name , instr(b.table_name , '.' )+1) as childrenTableName, a.node_name as nodeName, a.sub_flow_name as flowName from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE a , (select node_name,sub_flow_name,type,table_name from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE where type=2 ) b where a.node_name = b.node_name and a.sub_flow_name=b.sub_flow_name and a.type=1) t left join (select objectname,tableid,tablename from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o1 on upper(t.childrenTableName) = upper(o1.tablename) left join (select objectname,tableid,tablename from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o2 on upper(t.parentTableName) = upper(o2.tablename) left join (select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT from ( select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by concat(TABLEPROJECT,tablename) order by PARTITIONDATE desc) as num from synlte.syndmg_table_all where TABLECOMMENT is not null) t where t.num=1 and t.PARTITIONDATE is not null) o3 on upper(t.parentTN) = upper(o3.tableproject||'.'||o3.tablename) left join (select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT from ( select TABLEPROJECT,tablename ,TABLECOMMENT, PARTITIONDATE, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by concat(TABLEPROJECT,tablename) order by PARTITIONDATE desc) as num from synlte.syndmg_table_all where TABLECOMMENT is not null) t where t.num=1 and t.PARTITIONDATE is not null) o4 on upper(t.childrenTN) = upper(o4.tableproject||'.'||o4.tablename) where upper(childrentn) != upper(parenttn)
select NODE_ID as nodeId,max(FILE_VERSION) as maxVersion from M_NODE_THREE group by NODE_ID
mapper.delete: delete from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE where node_id is not null
mapper.select: select count(*) from M_NODE_IN_OUT_TABLE where to_char(insert_date,'yyyymmdd')= to_char(SYSDATE,'yyyymmdd')
select distinct objectId from synlte.OBJECT WHERE UPPER(TABLEID) = UPPER(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1
select count(distinct application_name) as applicationNameSum , count(distinct TABLENAME_EN) as involvedTableSum from applicationsystem

select * from ( select distinct t1.application_name||t1.sub_module_name||t1.tablename_en, lower(t1.application_name) as applicationSystem, lower(t1.sub_module_name) as oneLevelModule, upper(t1.tablename_en) as tableNameEn, case when t1.tablename_ch is null then t2.objectname else t1.tablename_ch end as tableNameCh , t2.tableid as tableId, t1.insert_date as insert_date from applicationsystem t1 left join (select * from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and DELETED = 0) t2 on upper(t1.tablename_en) = upper(t2.tablename) )
applicationSystem is not null
and ( upper(applicationSystem) like upper(#{inputSearch}||'%') or upper(oneLevelModule) like upper(#{inputSearch}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper(#{inputSearch}||'%') or upper(tableNameCh) like upper(#{inputSearch}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper(#{inputSearch}||'%') )
order by ${sort} ${sortOrder}
order by insert_date desc
select application_name as applicationSystem, sub_module_name as oneLevelModule from applicationsystem where application_name is not null
mapper.delete: delete from applicationsystem where upper(application_name) = upper(#{applicationName}) and upper(sub_module_name) =upper(#{subModuleName}) and upper(tablename_en) = upper(#{tableNameEn})
mapper.select:
select distinct dataName from( select distinct tablename_en as dataName from applicationsystem
tablename_en is not null
and upper(tablename_en) like upper(#{searchValue})||'%'
union all select distinct tablename_ch as dataName from applicationsystem
tablename_ch is not null and upper(tablename_ch) like upper(#{searchValue})||'%'
1 = 2
)

select t1.nodeName, t1.flowName, t1.projectName, t1.fileVersion from(select t.node_name as nodeName, t.flow_name as flowName, t.project_name as projectName ,t.FILE_VERSION as fileVersion from( select node_name, flow_name, project_name , FILE_VERSION, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by node_name||flow_name||project_name order by file_version desc) as num from m_node where node_type = #{nodeType} ) t where t.num =1 and t.node_name is not null and t.flow_name is not null and t.project_name is not null) t1 left join (select instance_id,node_name ,flow_name,project_name,num from(select instance_id,node_name ,flow_name,project_name ,ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by node_name||flow_name||project_name order by begin_run_time desc) as num from m_flow where begin_run_time > sysdate - 180 ) where num=1) t2 on t1.flowName = t2.node_name and t1.projectName = t2.project_name where instance_id is not null
select count(0) from m_node_in_out_table

select sjxjbm as tableId, tablename as tableNameEn, case when primaryorganizationch = '未知' then '其它' when primaryorganizationch = '业务要素索引库' then '其它' else primaryorganizationch end as organizationClassifyName from classify_interface_all_date where sjxjbm is not null and tablename is not null
select objectname from synlte.object where upper(tablename) = upper(#{tableName}) and rownum = 1
select count(0) from ApplicationSystem where upper(APPLICATION_NAME) =upper(#{applicationName}) and upper(SUB_MODULE_NAME) =upper(#{subModuleName}) and upper(TABLENAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn})
select count(distinct APPLICATION_NAME) from ApplicationSystem where APPLICATION_NAME is not null
